topic: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 1 — Zero & First Conditional

drills.title: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 1 — Zero & First Conditional — Speaking Set 1

sentences.english: If water heats to 100 degrees, it boils.
sentences.hindi: अगर पानी 100 डिग्री तक गर्म होता है, तो वह उबलता है।
sentences.pronunciation: if water heats to 100 degrees it boils

sentences.english: If you heat ice, it melts.
sentences.hindi: अगर तुम बर्फ को गर्म करते हो, तो वह पिघल जाती है।
sentences.pronunciation: if you heat ice it melts

sentences.english: If I get time, I will come.
sentences.hindi: अगर मुझे समय मिला, तो मैं आऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: if i get time i will come

drills.title: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 1 — Zero & First Conditional — Speaking Set 2

sentences.english: If it rains, we will stay home.
sentences.hindi: अगर बारिश हुई, तो हम घर पर रहेंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: if it rains we will stay home

sentences.english: If you work hard, you will succeed.
sentences.hindi: अगर तुम मेहनत करोगे, तो सफल होगे।
sentences.pronunciation: if you work hard you will succeed

sentences.english: If he comes early, we will start.
sentences.hindi: अगर वह जल्दी आया, तो हम शुरू करेंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: if he comes early we will start

drills.title: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 1 — Zero & First Conditional — Speaking Set 3

sentences.english: If the sun comes out, the day is warm.
sentences.hindi: अगर सूरज निकलता है, तो दिन गर्म होता है।
sentences.pronunciation: if the sun comes out the day is warm

sentences.english: If you eat this, you will feel good.
sentences.hindi: अगर तुम यह खाओगे, तो तुम्हें अच्छा लगेगा।
sentences.pronunciation: if you eat this you will feel good

sentences.english: If you need help, tell me.
sentences.hindi: अगर तुम्हें मदद चाहिए, तो मुझे बताओ।
sentences.pronunciation: if you need help tell me

drills.title: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 1 — Zero & First Conditional — Speaking Set 4

sentences.english: If he doesn't come, we will start.
sentences.hindi: अगर वह नहीं आया, तो हम शुरू करेंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: if he doesn't come we will start

sentences.english: If you go out in summer, you sweat.
sentences.hindi: अगर तुम गर्मी में बाहर जाते हो, तो पसीना आता है।
sentences.pronunciation: if you go out in summer you sweat

sentences.english: If I pass this exam, I will be happy.
sentences.hindi: अगर मैं यह exam पास करूँ, तो मैं खुश होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: if i pass this exam i will be happy

drills.title: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 1 — Zero & First Conditional — Speaking Set 5

sentences.english: If plants don't get water, they die.
sentences.hindi: अगर पानी नहीं मिलेगा, तो पौधे मर जाएंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: if plants don't get water they die

sentences.english: If you sleep early, you will wake up early.
sentences.hindi: अगर तुम जल्दी सोओगे, तो जल्दी उठोगे।
sentences.pronunciation: if you sleep early you will wake up early

sentences.english: If you don't understand this, ask.
sentences.hindi: अगर तुम्हें यह नहीं समझ आया, तो पूछो।
sentences.pronunciation: if you don't understand this ask

drills.title: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 1 — Zero & First Conditional — Speaking Set 6

sentences.english: If the sun comes out, snow melts.
sentences.hindi: अगर धूप निकलती है, तो बर्फ पिघलती है।
sentences.pronunciation: if the sun comes out snow melts

sentences.english: If you do this, I will be happy.
sentences.hindi: अगर तुम यह करोगे, तो मैं खुश होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: if you do this i will be happy

sentences.english: If the electricity goes off, the room becomes dark.
sentences.hindi: अगर बिजली चली जाती है, तो कमरा अंधेरा हो जाता है।
sentences.pronunciation: if the electricity goes off the room becomes dark

drills.title: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 1 — Zero & First Conditional — Speaking Set 7

sentences.english: If you practice, you will get better.
sentences.hindi: अगर तुम practice करोगे, तो बेहतर बनोगे।
sentences.pronunciation: if you practice you will get better

sentences.english: If I get a chance, I will go abroad.
sentences.hindi: अगर मुझे मौका मिला, तो मैं विदेश जाऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: if i get a chance i will go abroad
